name: Recent papers with explicit narrow open questions
instruction: Search recent primary papers, then verify status through citations and author pages; prefer one bounded parameter case.

name: House of Graphs
instruction: Look for an interesting extremal graph, missing order, or counterexample with a compact graph6 witness and independent invariant checker.

name: La Jolla Combinatorics Repository
instruction: Look for one missing or improvable exact construction with an accepted repository route.

name: Mathlib
instruction: Prefer a small research-connected formalization gap or reusable lemma with a scoped upstream PR.

name: OEIS
instruction: Only consider a sequence contribution tied to real research and suitable for one careful human submission; never bulk-generate.

name: Erdős Problems
instruction: Prefer finite-witness or decidable entries whose exact current page confirms the status.
